findings.description: The document title 'Draft Cape Fear River Water Supply Evaluation' loses its italic formatting in the HTML version.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'Draft Cape Fear River Water Supply Evaluation' is italicized. In the HTML, it appears without italic formatting, just in quotation marks.

findings.description: The document title 'Draft Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocation Recommendations' loses its italic formatting in the HTML version.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'Draft Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocation Recommendations' is italicized. In the HTML, it appears without italic formatting, just in quotation marks.

findings.description: The two 'here' hyperlinks for meeting location maps contain specific Google Maps URLs that are not visible in the PDF source text. The PDF only shows the word 'here' as a hyperlink without displaying the destination URL.
findings.evidence: HTML contains full Google Maps URLs like 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Chatham+Community+Library/...' and 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/230+Government+Center+Dr,...'. These may be the actual link destinations embedded in the PDF, but they cannot be verified from the PDF text alone.

findings.description: The main DEQ website URL in the HTML differs slightly from the PDF in hyphenation of the path segments, though it appears to resolve to the same page.
findings.evidence: PDF shows: 'http://deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/water-resources/planning/basin-planning/mappage/cape-fear-river-basin-landing/jordan-lake-water-supply-allocation/jordan-lake-water-supplyallocation-round-4'. HTML shows: 'http://deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/water-resources/planning/basin-planning/map-page/cape-fear-river-basin-landing/jordan-lake-water-supply-allocation/jordan-lake-water-supply-allocation-round-4'. The PDF version has 'mappage' (no hyphen) and 'supplyallocation' (no hyphen) due to line-break artifacts, while the HTML correctly restores the hyphens.
